p2_system_enter: >>> WARNING: Dimensional transition detected. Environment: Unstable. Hostile presence: OVERWHELMING.
p2_aria_fear: Do you feel that? This darkness... it's alive. It's watching us.
p2_protag_focus: Stay together. No splitting up, no matter what happens.
p2_aldric_warning: This dimension doesn't obey normal laws of nature. Don't trust your senses blindly.
p2_kael_ahead: I'll scout ahead. Three corridors - left, right, and straight. Left smells like... death.
p2_luna_careful: Please be careful, Kael. My healing is weaker here... the darkness swallows the light.
p2_system_threat: >>> COMBAT ALERT: General Malachar, Shadow Warden. Recommended strategy: Combination attack.
p2_aria_combo: Together, like in training! I go left, you go right - pincer attack!
p2_protag_combo: Got it! On my signal - NOW!
p2_aria_victory: That was close... but he's defeated. One of Nihilus' generals, fallen.
p2_aldric_more: Don't celebrate yet. I sense two more presences. Stronger than the first.
p2_system_trap: >>> WARNING: Dimensional trap detected. Originator: General Krynn. Type: Spatial compression. Countdown: 45 seconds. Escape route: NONE.
p2_kael_trap: This is Krynn's doing - a trap! The entire corridor is collapsing! But... I can see the mechanism. I can stop it.
p2_kael_sacrifice: Go on. I'll hold the trap. No - listen to me. This can only be deactivated from the inside. And I'm the only one fast enough.
p2_choice_stop_kael: No! There has to be another way!
p2_kael_last_words: Hey, smile! This isn't my end - it's my greatest trick! ...Finish Nihilus. For me.
p2_luna_kael_cry: No... no, no, no... Kael, you idiot... you promised...
p2_aria_mourn: He knew. That's why his hands were shaking last night. He knew he would...
p2_protag_vengeance: Nihilus will pay for this. For Kael. For everything.
p2_aldric_forward: Kael bought us time. Let's not waste it. He would have wanted that.
p2_luna_heal_all: Wait... let me heal everyone before we move on. No matter the cost.
p2_system_luna_warning: >>> WARNING: Healer life energy falling below critical threshold. 15%... 8%... STOP RECOMMENDED.
p2_luna_collapse: I... I can't anymore... I'm sorry... everything is... going dark...
p2_aldric_luna: I'll carry her. She's still breathing - but she can't fight anymore. It's just the three of us now.
p2_protag_carry_on: Then three will have to be enough. Aldric - you carry Luna. Aria - you and me, shoulder to shoulder.
p2_system_vexara: >>> COMBAT ALERT: General Vexara, Spirit Witch. Warning: Aldric combat-disabled (carrying wounded). Combat strength: REDUCED.
p2_aria_alone: Without Aldric and Luna... can the two of us pull this off?
p2_protag_alone: We have to. There's no turning back.
p2_protag_exhausted: She's... defeated. But my arms... I can barely hold the sword.
p2_aria_hurt: Me neither. But up ahead... Nihilus' throne room. We're so close.
p2_system_throne: >>> Nihilus' throne room detected. Energy level: BEYOND ALL MEASUREMENTS. Recommendation: ...none.
p2_aldric_last_chance: This is our last chance. Whatever waits behind that door... we face it. United.
p2_aria_final_push: For Kael. For Luna. For everyone waiting for us.
p2_protag_no_retreat: No retreat. No regrets. Only forward.
